detections.label: baitaishe
detections.name: 白苔舌White coating tongue
detections.meaning: 舌苔偏白，常作为寒湿、脾胃功能偏弱或早期外感的观察信号。A white coating on the tongue is often seen as a sign of cold-dampness, weak spleen function, or early external contraction.
possible_risks: 脾胃功能偏弱风险Risk of Weak Spleen Function

detections.label: liewenshe
detections.name: 裂纹舌Cracked tongue
detections.meaning: 舌面裂纹明显，常作为津液不足、阴虚或长期消化吸收状态异常的观察信号。A cracked tongue is often seen as a sign of insufficient body fluids, yin deficiency, or abnormal digestive function.
possible_risks: 津液不足风险Risk of Insufficient Body Fluids
阴虚风险Risk of Yin Deficiency

detections.label: chihenshe
detections.name: 齿痕舌Dentate tongue
detections.meaning: 舌边齿痕明显，常作为脾虚、湿重或水液代谢偏弱的观察信号。A dentate tongue is often seen as a sign of spleen deficiency, excessive dampness, or weak water metabolism.
possible_risks: 脾虚湿重风险Risk of Spleen Deficiency and Excessive Dampness
